header.brand_strategy_desc: The foundation for your brand — market analysis, positioning, and communication.
header.naming_desc: Choosing a memorable, strong, and legally clear name for your brand.
header.logo_design_desc: Creating a unique and memorable sign that reflects the essence of your business.

cookieConsent.message: Our website uses delicious cookies. They help us remember you. If you agree, let's share them together.

metadata.title: Brandbook Development | Jon.Branding Agency
metadata.description: Brandbook is the constitution of your brand. We create comprehensive brandbooks that ensure the consistency of your brand and save on marketing costs.
metadata.keywords: brandbook, guideline, corporate identity, brand design, logo usage rules, branding agency

brandbookPage.title: Brandbook Development
brandbookPage.subtitle: Brandbook is not just a document with logos, it is the constitution of your brand, which ensures its consistency and integrity.
brandbookPage.section1_title: Why does every business need a brandbook?
brandbookPage.section1_p1: A brandbook is a key tool for managing a brand. It clearly defines all the rules for using the visual and ideological elements of your company - from the logo and colors to the tone of communication.
brandbookPage.section1_p2: This document helps to avoid chaos in marketing, ensures brand recognition, and saves time and money when working with designers, marketers, and other contractors.

values.title: Consistency and Recognition
values.description: Ensures that your brand looks the same and professional on all platforms - from a business card to a website.

values.title: Resource Savings
values.description: Eliminates the need to explain the design rules to each new employee or contractor, speeding up the work process.

values.title: Brand Protection
values.description: Protects your identity from incorrect use, preserving the integrity and value of your brand.

brandbookPage.process_subtitle: Our brandbooks contain all the necessary sections for effective brand management:

process_steps.title: Brand Platform
process_steps.description: Mission, values, brand character, and target audience.

process_steps.title: Logo and Identity
process_steps.description: Rules for using the logo, corporate colors, and fonts.

process_steps.title: Visual Style
process_steps.description: Rules for using photos, illustrations, and graphic elements.

process_steps.title: Practical Application
process_steps.description: Examples of design for real media (business cards, presentations, social media).

brandbookPage.cta_title: Ready to bring order to your brand?
brandbookPage.cta_description: A professional brandbook is an investment in the stable future of your business. Let's create a document that will become your reliable assistant.

headlines: Your branding |isn't selling?| We'll fix it.
Make your brand not just "pretty", but |profitable|.
Make customers |fall in love| with you. Again and again.
From small business to a |strong brand|. In one step.
hero.description: We don't just draw logos. As a leading branding agency in Tashkent, we build a results-driven, strategy-based brand system for your business that will win the hearts of your customers. We offer brand strategy, naming, and logo design services.

metadata.title: Mini-test: Is your business ready for branding? | Jon.Branding
metadata.description: Answer a few simple questions and find out how ready your business is for branding, its strengths and weaknesses.

questions.question: Is the core idea or mission of your business expressed in one sentence?
questions.brandExample: Volvo — safety; Nike — to bring inspiration and innovation to every athlete in the world.

options.text: Yes, clear and understandable for everyone
No, I haven't thought about it

questions.question: Can you clearly imagine your target audience (ideal customer)?
questions.brandExample: Apple — creative professionals and tech enthusiasts; Johnson's Baby — young moms.

options.text: Yes, I know their needs and desires
No, I'm trying to sell to everyone

questions.question: With what specific advantages does your brand differ from competitors?
questions.brandExample: Tesla — innovative electric cars; M&M's — 'melts in your mouth, not in your hands'.

options.text: I have at least 2-3 specific advantages

questions.question: Does your visual appearance (logo, colors, design) reflect your business values?
questions.brandExample: Coca-Cola red — energy and passion; Tiffany & Co. turquoise — luxury and elegance.

options.text: No, I didn't pay attention to this

questions.question: Do your customers have a single and positive opinion about you?
questions.brandExample: Starbucks — not just coffee, but a third place; Zappos — amazing customer service.

options.text: Yes, my brand reputation is solid
It varies, sometimes there are negative reviews
I don't know, I haven't conducted a survey

bad.title: You need help (5-8 points)
bad.description: Your brand foundation is weak. To stand out from competitors and win customer loyalty, you definitely need professional help.

medium.title: Good potential, but there are gaps (9-12 points)
medium.description: You have a good foundation, but your brand can be even stronger and more effective. Let's fill the existing gaps.

good.title: Excellent! Your brand foundation is solid (13-15 points)
good.description: Congratulations! You are on the right track in branding issues. Now it's time to strengthen this foundation and become a market leader.

result.afterSubmitText: In the near future, our specialist will contact you for a detailed analysis of your test results and providing personal recommendations.

brandStrategyPage.title: Brand Strategy
brandStrategyPage.subtitle: Brand strategy is the path to success for your business.
brandStrategyPage.section1_p1: Without a clear strategy, any design remains just a pretty picture.
brandStrategyPage.section1_p2: We study your audience, your competitors, and ensure you stand out in the market.
brandStrategyPage.section2_p2_text: Defining your place in the market.
brandStrategyPage.section2_p3_text: Winning a place in customers' hearts.
brandStrategyPage.process_subtitle: We build your brand through these stages:

process_steps.title: Goal
process_steps.description: Defining the core task of your brand.

process_steps.title: Positioning
process_steps.description: Finding your unique place in the market.
